tasks.subject: Task 3: message-relations.service — CRUD + scope + cardinality
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New service owning relation edge CRUD with scope/cardinality/self-ref/target-existence checks.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.spec.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.errors.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/properties.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server jest -- --testPathPattern=message-relations.service.spec.ts --coverage","acceptanceCriteria":["setRelationTargets with diff + txn","scope=same_channel enforced","cardinality=single rejects multi","self-ref rejected","target not found rejected","getOutgoingTargets order preserved","getIncomingSources filters deleted sources","100% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cycle detection + depth limit (WITH RECURSIVE)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CTE-based cycle check across relation edges AND thread parentId before parent-kind INSERTs.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server jest -- --testPathPattern=message-relations.service.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["direct and indirect cycles rejected","depth>=10 rejected","thread-derived cycles caught","cycle check skipped for relationKind=related"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Effective parent + subtree query
tasks.description:
**Goal:** getEffectiveParent (COALESCE + explicitlyCleared) and getSubtree (recursive CTE with hasChildren lookahead).

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/properties/message-relations.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server jest -- --testPathPattern=message-relations.service.spec.ts --coverage","acceptanceCriteria":["effectiveParent returns relation > thread > null","explicitlyCleared flag yields null","getSubtree respects maxDepth","hasChildren accurate at leaf"]}
```
